label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 5

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won a sprint by one-third of a wheel over teammate Ganna after Evenepoel took intermediate bonus seconds to extend GC lead before summit finish the next day.
tactical_patterns: Evenepoel took 6 bonus seconds at intermediate sprint before summit finish next day, while sprint teams conserved energy.
Sepulveda attacked categorized climb solo despite breakaway being present to maximize KOM points gap before mountains.
Ganna played leadout for Groves despite being co-protected sprinter, revealing team hierarchy when both are present.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Aggressively hunted intermediate bonuses day before major summit finish, extending 6-second lead to 11 seconds rather than conserving
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Won by minimal margin after sitting on teammate's wheel through leadout, showing superior positioning instinct
rider_signals.MENTEN Marlon: negative: Crashed on roundabout approach, eliminating him from sprint contention before finale
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: neutral: Executed leadout for Groves from 650m but nearly won himself, suggesting ambiguous team hierarchy
